basic_details.job_title: Ordnance Factory Hospital Dehradun Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Ordnance Factory Hospital Dehradun Hired Medical Practitioner Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Ordnance Factory Hospital Dehradun. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Ordnance Factory Hospital Dehradun Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for the walk-in interview for the Hired Medical Practitioner post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Hired Medical Practitioner post at Ordnance Factory Hospital Dehradun is scheduled for 16 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Hired Medical Practitioner position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Hired Medical Practitioner position is an MBBS Degree recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Hired Medical Practitioner post is 69 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Hired Medical Practitioner role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Hired Medical Practitioner position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Hired Medical Practitioner post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Hired Medical Practitioner post at Ordnance Factory Hospital Dehradun.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Hired Medical Practitioner recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Ordnance Factory Hospital Dehradun office. The exact address and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job for the Hired Medical Practitioner post is on a contractual basis.
